title: Alberta budget 2019: Youth minimum wage to be reduced
notes: Youth minimum wage $13/hr takes effect June 26 2019. Applies to workers aged 13-17; general $15/hr retained for adults. Labour Minister Copping: 'bringing back balance.' NDP critic Gray: 'Don't do this.' Youth worker: 'that money I'm not making I could be adding to my university fund.' Multiple businesses pledge to retain $15 for all workers. Anchors EVT-052.
